serviceName: Respond to a property possession claim
feedback: This is a new service – your feedback (opens in new tab) will help us to improve it.
contactUsForHelpText: If you need help using this service, contact us.

contactUsDetailsEmailIntroSuffix: to get your local court’s email address.
contactUsDetailsEmailHelp: If you do not know the name of your local court, select the ‘Money’ category and then the ‘Housing’ category to find it.
contactUsDetailsCallChargesLinkText: Find out about call charges (opens in new tab)

403.title: Not Authorised

404.title: Page not found
404.paragraph: This could be because you’ve followed a broken or outdated link, or because there’s an error on our site. Use the browser back button to go to the previous page.
